# License — patterns-svg-backgrounds

## Upstream

- Primary: https://svgbackgrounds.com (Matt Visiwig and contributors)
- License: most patterns published on svgbackgrounds.com are free-for-commercial use with attribution; premium variants require purchase.
- Additional simple geometric shapes in this folder may be public-domain generic geometry (badges, circles, arrows) where the shapes are too basic for copyright protection.

## Acquisition note

Direct curl of publicly served SVG assets. No paywalled premium-pack downloads. No account circumvention.

## Use in Clawmachine

Internal non-commercial use by a single UK operator (Regan Cooney) for a private electronics fix-and-flip tool. If specific patterns marked "premium" on svgbackgrounds.com are carried into the shipped Clawmachine, the premium license for those specific patterns must be purchased before distribution.

Attribution obligation on ship: credit "svgbackgrounds.com (Matt Visiwig)" in the product credits / acknowledgements panel for any free-tier pattern actually used in the final build.
